title: Inline object in list renderItem
message: This object is rebuilt for every row, so your memo() rows still redraw.
help: Move style and object props out of renderItem (StyleSheet.create, useMemo at list scope, or pass primitives) so memo() rows stop redrawing when their data has not changed.
